en: Go and work for your grandfather and make something of yourself.
ko: 할아버지에게 가서 일하고 제대로 된 사람이 되어라, 공정하게 놀지 말고.

en: That's very good. When did you do this one?
It was the day at the beach. First time I met Fred.
What's he doing? He's in London on business.
He'll be back in a few weeks.
ko: 그는 런던에서 사업 중이야, 몇 주 후에 돌아올 거야.
